title: Gauhati High Court denies anticipatory bail to Congress leader Pawan Khera in Assam Police FIR
description: The Gauhati High Court on Friday rejected Congress leader Pawan Khera's plea for anticipatory bail in the case recently registered against him by the Crime Branch of Assam Police in Guwahati.Justice Parthivjyoti Saikia had reserved the decision on Khera's bail plea on April 21. Today, the Court rejected the bail plea.It said that Khera's custodial interrogation was necessary to investigate the matter."There are no materials in this case to suggest that the accusations brought against the present
